summary: Russian forces dropped fake money with QR codes from "Gerbera" drones over border regions as a psychological operation. In the Zaporizhzhia region, an FPV drone captured an airstrike on a Ukrainian air defense system in Vozdvizhevka. Ukrainian forces in the Kharkiv region destroyed a BMP-1 armored vehicle in a shelter using consecutive strikes from fiber-optic FPV drones "Provod" and "KVN." Russian "Yolka" anti-drone systems demonstrated kinetic interception capabilities, with one system destroying an enemy UAV just 5 seconds after launch and another intercepting a fixed-wing UAV with two drones arriving within fractions of a second. Ukrainian soldiers from the 36th Marine Brigade survived a Russian FPV drone attack near Kostiantinivka, with the cameraman holding a drone detector at 0:11 in the footage.
